title: aridaria rangei
intro: Aridaria rangei, also known as the mountain saw-wort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is known to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Aridaria rangei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive problems.
